使本技能対次要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%

[EndSkill] 使除<color=#ffffff>自身</color>以外<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>最低的(1+最大<color=#7C5738>共鳴</color>数)名其他<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>恢復8点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>(最多4名)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加1級[Combustion]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加1級[Laceration]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>随机対1名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>施加1層[ThatIsRhythm](每个硬幣最多1次)

levelList.name: 和声
levelList.desc:
[CantIdentify]
随机指定<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度与[Combustion]之和每有2級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+<style="highlight">8</style>)
根据<color=#ffffff>自身</color>已失去<color=#61DA61>体力</color>比例，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>相應増加(最多+<style="highlight">15</style>%)
使本技能対次要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%
[BeforeAttack] 使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+(最大<color=#7C5738>共鳴</color>数/2)(最多+2，向下取整)
[BeforeAttack] 本技能每有1枚硬幣被摧毀，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>-2(最多-6)
[EndSkill] 使<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>最低的4名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>恢復<style="highlight">12</style>点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[EndSkill] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>獲得1層[CrimsonDamageUp]、1層[ScarletDamageUp]与1層[VioletDamageUp]并対其施加2層[ThatIsRhythm]与1層[Vulnerable]
- 若<color=#7C5738>撃殺</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則額外触発1次該效果

coindescs.desc: [SuperCoin]
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加2級[Laceration]強度
[SuperCoin]
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加2級[Combustion]強度
[SuperCoin]

[OnSucceedAttack] 若現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不低于10%，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>受到10~20点<color=#61DA61>体力</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>(每个硬幣最多1次)
- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>因該效果消耗的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于50点，則<color=#ffffff>重復使用</color>本硬幣(每个技能最多4次)
- <color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会因該<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>而陷入混乱或使<color=#61DA61>体力</color>降至1点以下
coindescs.summary:
[OnSucceedAttack] 消耗<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>
満足条件時<color=#ffffff>重復使用</color>本硬幣

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加1級[Combustion]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加1級[Laceration]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>随机対1名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>施加<style="highlight">1~2</style>層[ThatIsRhythm](每个硬幣最多1次)
